rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA ANN FRANTOM VS. HEIDI DETJEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Hearing De Novo Or Reconsideration In Opposition To Deft'S Motion To Strike Plntf'S
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 2, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA FRANTOM'S MOTION FOR HEARING DE NOVO OR RECONSIDERATION IN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE. DENIED. The motion is untimely under CCP 1008(a) and improper under CCP 1008(b); the notice of motion is insufficient under CCP 1005 and 1013. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. =(501/REQ)
